summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Referral System (iteration 158). All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all 3 views (Tree, D3 Visual, Table), search functionality, stats cards, and sidebar navigation. Admin user Ryan Salvador has RYAN_MERIN referral code set.

issues: Minor: D3 tree visualization node labels are small/truncated - may be difficult to read with many nodes

critical_code_review_comments: External rewards platform validation (_validate_code_external) is best-effort and may fail silently - consider adding user feedback when validation fails
The referral onboarding modal correctly excludes admin roles from the mandatory onboarding flow
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account with RYAN_MERIN referral code
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referral system is fully functional. Admin user (iam@ryansalvador.com) has referral code RYAN_MERIN set. The /admin/referrals page has 3 views: Tree (collapsible), Visual (D3), and Table (with search). Stats cards show Total Users, With Code, Referred, and Onboarded %. Habit reward points scale with streak: 5/10/20/35 points based on tier.

backend_endpoints: GET /api/referrals/my-code - Returns referral code, direct referrals count, onboarding status
GET /api/referrals/check-onboarding - Returns needs_onboarding (false for admins), has_referral_code, role
POST /api/referrals/set-code - Correctly prevents duplicate code setting, validates code length >= 3
POST /api/referrals/set-referred-by - Prevents self-referral, validates inviter exists
GET /api/referrals/admin/tree - Returns tree structure and stats (total_users, users_with_code, users_referred, onboarding_completion_rate)
GET /api/referrals/admin/flat-list - Pagination and search work correctly
POST /api/referrals/admin/set-code - Validates user existence and code length
POST /api/referrals/habit-reward - Awards streak-based points (5/10/20/35), prevents double award same day
GET /api/auth/me - Now includes referral_code and referred_by fields
frontend_features: Referral Tree nav item visible in sidebar under Admin section for super/master admin
Stats cards display: Total Users (15), With Code (1), Referred (0), Onboarded (6.7%)
Tree view shows collapsible user nodes with referral codes
D3 Visual view renders interactive tree graph
Table view with search functionality filters by name, email, or code
